name: Mexican Green Bean Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the green beans until they are tender-crisp, approximately 15 minutes.
2. Drain the steamed green beans.
3. In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, jalapeno peppers, vinegar, lemon juice, onion, parsley, and cilantro.
4. Pour the dressing over the warm green beans.
5. Allow the salad to marinate for at least half an hour before serving.
6. Serve the salad at room temperature or chilled.
